zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox於1380年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素時，她的父親Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox35歲，母親Helen Campbell24歲。她於1406年9月23日與Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1429年12月在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯享年49歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox于1380年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾巴洛 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox35岁，母亲Helen Campbell24岁。她于1406年9月23日与Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1429年12月在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特奧爾萊安斯享年49岁，埋葬在法国崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox was born in 1380, in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, was 35 and her mother, Helen Campbell, was 24. She married Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny on 23 September 1406, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in December 1429, in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox est née en 1380, à Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Helen Campbell, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny le 23 septembre 1406, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en décembre 1429, à Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox 1380 in Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox 35 und ihre Mutter Helen Campbell 24. Sie hat am 23. September 1406 in Scotland Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb im Dezember 1429 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox è nata il nel 1380 nel Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Helen Campbell, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny il 23 settembre 1406, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel dicembre 1429, nel Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennoxが1380年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアボーロチ カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennoxは35歳，母Helen Campbellは24歳であった。1406年9月23日にスコットランドでSir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1429年12月にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトオルルeアンスで49歳で死去し，フランスセントアロイアーエトオルルeアンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox(이)가 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 바럭 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Campbell(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1406년 9월 23일 스컷랜드에서 Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 12월 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 올를e아스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox nasceu em 1380, em Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Helen Campbell, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny em 23 de setembro de 1406, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1429, em Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Orléans, Loiret, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox родилась в 1380 г. в местности баллоч кастл, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Campbell, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny 23 сентября 1406 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла декабрь 1429 г. в местности орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности орлeанс, лоирет, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lennox - Countess Of Lennox nació en 1380, en Balloch Castle, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Duncan Lennox 8th Earl of Lennox, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Helen Campbell, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Stewart 1st Seigneur d'Aubigny el 23 de septiembre de 1406, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en diciembre de 1429, en Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Francia.
